Section 04

SMS Receipt Flow

Digital Receipt Dispatch — 4-Step Customer Communication

Steps 1 – 4
Note: The SMS receipt is the recommended receipt method as it creates a digital record for the customer. Always offer SMS receipts for EMI transactions to ensure the customer has a clear record of their cashback and EMI tenure details.
Important: The SMS receipt does not replace the printed merchant copy. Always retain the printed merchant receipt in your daily settlement records for reconciliation purposes.
Paytm for Business × OnePlus Confidential — May 2026 Page 06
Section 05

How to Cancel (Void) a Transaction

6-Step Reversal Procedure — Same-Day Only

Steps 1 – 6
⚠️ Critical Void Window: Void/cancellation must be completed on the same calendar day as the original transaction, before midnight batch settlement. Transactions settled overnight cannot be voided — contact Paytm support for post-settlement disputes.
Paytm for Business × OnePlus Confidential — May 2026 Page 07
